fallback.reason: No local cangjie skill was available in this runtime's skill list. I used the available book2skill and skill-creator guidance instead.

metadataSupplemented.reason: The local source files were web/book-record extracts rather than full book chapters. They contained core metadata and the organizing-system definition, but not enough detailed chapter content for deeper extraction.
items: Used the Open Textbook Library record to confirm title, author, ISBN, copyright year, publisher, license, table of contents, and book description.
Used the iSchools record to confirm first publication, 2014 ASIS&T recognition, fourth-edition availability, edition variants, and broad disciplinary use.

Supplemented the operational workflow from the official online edition/table-of-contents structure implied by the source record: resources, metadata, relationships, categorization, classification, interactions, and roadmap.
